content:
萬千並肩時刻，定格光影之中。「舊日夢囈」忘卻篇-鐳射票 即將販售！未來我們將推出種類更加豐富的喚醒體周邊，敬請期待！
⭐**現貨開售時間：**2025年5月30日 12:00 (UTC+8)
⭐**點擊連結即可購買：**https://s.tb.cn/c.0wDlPO
⭐**產品內容：**本套周邊共43款鐳射票（「環行·拉蒙娜」特殊款僅在隨機組合包中產出，概率2.3%），含忘卻篇全喚醒體。
⭐**產品售價：**
✦ 混沌界域組合包/98元：「忘卻篇」全部混沌界域喚醒體（共14款）
✦ 深海界域組合包/68元：「忘卻篇」全部深海界域喚醒體（共9款）
✦ 血肉界域組合包/78元：「忘卻篇」全部血肉界域喚醒體（共10款）
✦ 超維界域組合包/68元：「忘卻篇」全部超維界域喚醒體（共9款）
✦ 隨機組合包/28元：任意五款（不重複）隨機發貨，有2%機率獲得主美KPK簽名版
✦ 單張直售/15元：任意單款鐳射票

🎁**今日萊克大轉盤：**周邊抽獎

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

The "Murmurs of Days Past" Faded Legacy - Laser Tickets will be available soon! In the future, we will release an even wider variety of Awakener merchandise. Stay tuned!

⭐ Available for purchase on May 30, 2025 at 12:00 (UTC+8)
⭐**Click Link to Buy: **https://s.tb.cn/c.0wDlPO
⭐**Product Contents: **This set includes 43 laser tickets (the "Ramona: Timeworn" Special Edition is only available in the random combo pack,Probability 2.3%), covering all Awakener characters from Faded Legacy.
⭐ **Product Price:**
✦ Chaos Realm Combo / 98 yuan: "Faded Legacy" All Chaos Realm Awakeners (Total of 14)
✦ Deep Sea Realm Combo / 68 yuan: "Faded Legacy" All Deep Sea Realm Awakeners (Total of 9 items)
✦ Blood Caro Realm Combo / 78 yuan: "Faded Legacy" All Blood Caro Realm Awakeners (Total of 10items)
✦ Ultra Realm Combo Pack / 68 yuan: "Faded Legacy" All Ultra Realm Awakener (Total 9 items)
✦ Random Combo Pack / 28 yuan: Any five (non-repeating) items will be randomly shipped, with a chance to obtain a signed version by the artist KPK（Probability 2%）.
✦ Single direct sale / 15 yuan: Any single laser ticket

🎁 **Today's Ryker Big Wheel: **Official Merchandise Giveaway Event

「草原、高山……想一想我們要去哪裡呢？」
「手抄本裡的那麼多地方我們都沒有去過，真想都去看看。」

「會去的，一定！」

卡斯托爾 CV：加藤慎也
波呂克斯 CV：逢沢光明
——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

🎧 Castor丨2.2.2 Radio Drama- Before the Bird Fell
"Grasslands, mountains...Where should we go, I wonder?"
"so many places in the manuscript we've never seen. I want to go."

"We will one day. I'm sure of it."

Castor CV：加藤 慎也（Katō Shinya）
Pollux CV：逢沢 光明（Aizawa Mitsuaki）

▶繁中：https://youtu.be/ge1hZQexXjA
▶English：https://youtu.be/VJjMaadTJqA
